message:
fix(tools): harden LLM integration — Anthropic auth, JSON extraction, and char boundary safety

- Fix Anthropic API auth: pass raw key for x-api-key header instead of
  wrapping in Bearer prefix and then stripping it back off
- Rewrite extract_brace_json to iteratively try successive opening braces
  rather than naively using first-open/last-close which fails on text
  containing multiple brace pairs or prose before JSON
- Add safety check for empty body when truncating at char boundary to
  prevent panic on zero-length or invalid boundary state
- Update stubbed completion content and test assertions to match new
  extraction behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
